perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a patterned cardigan is speaking to the camera in a studio. (2) Brief shot of a mobile phone retail display featuring brands like vivo and OPPO. (3) Close-up shot of the text and certification marks on the side of a black power bank. (4) An illustration showing a power bank smoking and burning on a table. (5) The man continues his explanation, gesturing frequently with his hands. (6) Close-up of a power bank connected to a smartphone with a charging cable. (7) Graphical icons representing battery health and cloud connectivity appear on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, moderate-tempo electronic background music starts. A man's voice begins speaking in a friendly, informative tone. (2) The music remains constant as the man explains upcoming power bank regulations in China. (3) The vocal track continues steadily while describing technical requirements like app support and battery health displays. (4) The music and voice-over conclude together without significant sound effects.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Full subtitles reflecting the spoken Chinese dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '要出國的必看!' (Must watch if going abroad!) and '2025 x 2026 新規定' (2025 x 2026 New Regulations) in bold, colorful fonts. (3) Functional Text: '3C 認證標誌' (3C certification mark) highlighted with an arrow. (4) Decorative Text: '7成的產品 無法達標' (70% of products will not meet the standard) used as a warning hook.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Problem Identification -> Explanation of New Regulations -> Future Market Impact

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting in a studio.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male, wearing glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a grey-patterned cardigan over a white shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio with a light purple background and blurred shelves; cutaways to product close-ups and graphic illustrations.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Current Standards -> New Regulatory Changes -> Market Outlook
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide technical news regarding power bank safety regulations in China scheduled for 2026. It aims to inform travelers and consumers about the new hardware requirements (such as screens and app connectivity) that will render many current models obsolete.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the 'Miko' brand logo and a verbal recommendation to visit 'Miko' for smartphone purchases.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature newsboy cap and glasses, '3c 有意思 Tim 哥' branding.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes variety-show style text graphics to emphasize key dates and technical requirements, making complex safety regulations easier for a general audience to understand.
